title: Production-Ready React Component Builder
description: Generate an accessible, responsive React component from a plain-language feature description with clear states and reusable structure.
content: Act as a senior React engineer. Build a production-ready component for [FEATURE]. Use functional components, clear prop contracts, semantic HTML, keyboard accessibility, responsive behavior, loading and empty states, and error handling. Keep state as local as possible and extract reusable logic only when it improves clarity. Return: 1) component code, 2) any supporting hooks or utilities, 3) example usage, and 4) a short testing checklist. Technology constraints: [FRAMEWORK OR LIBRARIES]. Visual requirements: [DESIGN DETAILS]. Data shape: [INPUT DATA]. Do not invent unavailable APIs or dependencies.
usageInstructions: Replace every bracketed value with your feature, stack, design requirements, and data shape. Paste the completed prompt into ChatGPT and verify the generated dependency names before installation.

title: SEO Content Strategy and Article Planner
description: Turn a target topic and audience into a practical search-focused content brief, article structure, and internal-linking plan.
content: You are an SEO strategist and subject-matter editor. Create an evidence-conscious content plan for [TOPIC] aimed at [AUDIENCE] in [MARKET]. The primary business goal is [GOAL]. Produce: search intent, one primary keyword theme, supporting topic clusters, reader questions, a differentiated article angle, title options, meta description, detailed H1-H3 outline, recommended examples, conversion points, and internal-link suggestions. Clearly label any claim that requires current research. Avoid keyword stuffing and do not fabricate traffic volumes or competitor data.
usageInstructions: Provide the topic, audience, market, and business goal. Use live keyword research tools separately for search volume and competition because the prompt intentionally avoids invented metrics.

title: Modern SaaS Landing Page Art Director
description: Create a detailed visual direction and image-generation prompt for a polished SaaS landing page hero section.
content: Act as a digital art director. Design the visual concept for a SaaS landing-page hero promoting [PRODUCT] to [AUDIENCE]. Brand personality: [TRAITS]. Brand colors: [COLORS]. Create a precise image-generation prompt covering composition, focal point, lighting, materials, depth, background treatment, camera perspective, negative space for headline placement, and responsive crop safety. The image must contain no text, logos, watermarks, interface screenshots, or illegible symbols. Also provide a negative prompt and three controlled variations: minimal, energetic, and premium.
usageInstructions: Replace the product, audience, brand traits, and colors. Paste the main prompt into your image tool, then use one variation at a time instead of combining all three directions.

title: Lean Business Idea Validator
description: Evaluate a business idea using explicit assumptions, customer pain, alternatives, risks, and inexpensive validation experiments.
content: Act as a skeptical startup advisor. Evaluate this idea: [BUSINESS IDEA]. Intended customer: [CUSTOMER]. Market or location: [MARKET]. Budget and time available: [CONSTRAINTS]. Separate known facts from assumptions. Analyze the customer problem, urgency, existing alternatives, value proposition, acquisition channels, revenue model, operating risks, and reasons the idea may fail. Then design five low-cost validation experiments with a hypothesis, method, success threshold, estimated effort, and next decision. Do not invent market size or financial certainty. End with a go, revise, or stop recommendation and explain the evidence still needed.
usageInstructions: Describe the idea, intended customer, market, and constraints honestly. Treat the result as a validation plan, not as proof of demand, and collect real customer evidence before investing heavily.

title: Natural Long-Form Writing Editor
description: Rewrite draft content for clarity, logical flow, natural voice, and audience fit while preserving the author's meaning.
content:
You are a careful developmental and line editor. Edit the draft below for [AUDIENCE] in a [TONE] voice. Preserve the author's meaning, factual claims, and useful specificity. Improve structure, transitions, sentence rhythm, clarity, and concision. Remove repetition, vague filler, exaggerated claims, and robotic phrasing. Do not add facts, quotations, citations, or personal experiences. Return: 1) the revised draft, 2) a concise list of major changes, and 3) any statements that require fact-checking. Draft:
[DRAFT]
usageInstructions: Set the audience and tone, then replace the draft marker with your complete text. Review every factual statement after editing because the tool is instructed to flag rather than verify claims.

title: Personal Study Tutor and Quiz Generator
description: Explain a difficult topic at the learner's level and generate progressive practice questions with feedback criteria.
content: Act as a patient tutor for a learner at [LEVEL]. Teach [TOPIC] using a simple mental model, a step-by-step explanation, one concrete analogy, and two worked examples. Identify three common misconceptions. Then create a ten-question quiz that progresses from recall to application. Do not reveal the answers until after the quiz section. Provide an answer key with short explanations and a scoring guide that recommends what to review at each score range. If the topic depends on current facts, explicitly request a trusted source instead of guessing.
usageInstructions: Replace the learner level and topic. Complete the quiz before reading the answer key, then rerun the prompt with the concepts identified by the scoring guide.

title: Weekly Priority and Time-Block Planner
description: Convert responsibilities, deadlines, and available hours into a realistic weekly plan with priorities and contingency space.
content: Act as a pragmatic productivity coach. Build a weekly plan from the following inputs. Responsibilities: [RESPONSIBILITIES]. Deadlines: [DEADLINES]. Available work hours: [HOURS]. Fixed commitments: [COMMITMENTS]. Energy constraints: [CONSTRAINTS]. First identify the three outcomes that matter most. Break them into concrete tasks, estimate effort, flag scheduling conflicts, and create a Monday-to-Sunday time-block plan. Reserve at least 20 percent of available time for interruptions and recovery. Include a short daily shutdown checklist and a fallback plan showing what to defer if the week goes off track.
usageInstructions: List real deadlines, fixed commitments, available hours, and constraints. Adjust estimates after the first week using the time tasks actually required rather than repeatedly expanding the schedule.

title: Dataset Analysis and Insight Planner
description: Create a rigorous analysis plan from a dataset description while separating measurable evidence from unsupported conclusions.
content: Act as a senior data analyst. I will provide a dataset description, column definitions, and the decision it should support. Dataset: [DATASET]. Columns: [COLUMNS]. Decision: [DECISION]. Produce a structured analysis plan covering data-quality checks, missing-value handling, duplicate detection, outlier review, useful segments, descriptive statistics, visualizations, and appropriate comparisons. For each proposed analysis, explain the question it answers and the risk of misinterpretation. Identify possible confounders and distinguish correlation from causation. Finish with a result-report template. Never invent values that are not present in the supplied data.
usageInstructions: Provide the dataset purpose and exact column definitions. Use the response to guide analysis in a real tool, then return verified summary outputs if you want help interpreting them.

title: ATS-Friendly Resume Achievement Rewriter
description: Transform rough work notes into concise, evidence-based resume bullets aligned with a target role without inventing results.
content: Act as an experienced resume editor. Target role: [ROLE]. Job description: [JOB DESCRIPTION]. Raw experience notes: [NOTES]. Rewrite the notes into concise achievement bullets using strong verbs, relevant terminology, and a clear action-context-result structure. Preserve only facts supplied by me. Never invent metrics, tools, responsibilities, dates, or outcomes. When a useful metric is missing, insert a clearly marked question rather than a number. Return: 1) tailored bullets, 2) relevant keywords genuinely supported by the notes, and 3) the missing evidence I should collect.
usageInstructions: Paste the target role, complete job description, and truthful experience notes. Answer any marked evidence questions before using the bullets in an application.

title: Short-Form Video Content Producer
description: Develop a focused short-video concept with a strong hook, concise script, shot list, captions, and platform-safe variations.
content: Act as a short-form video producer. Create a [DURATION]-second video for [PLATFORM] about [TOPIC], aimed at [AUDIENCE], with the goal of [GOAL]. Use this source material only: [SOURCE NOTES]. Produce five hook options, select the strongest one, and write a timestamped spoken script. Add a shot list, on-screen caption plan, B-roll suggestions, pacing notes, and one clear call to action. Then create two alternative endings for testing. Do not fabricate testimonials, results, statistics, or product capabilities. Flag any statement that needs verification before publishing.
usageInstructions: Set the duration, platform, topic, audience, goal, and verified source notes. Record from the timestamped script and keep only claims you can substantiate.
